creator: sistemas@adminia.es
text:
We would like to make known our consulting and support services for FreeBSD in the Commercial Vendors gallery, Consulting services subsection:

Adminia offers technological consulting and professional system administration services, specializing in free software and virtualized high-availability environments. We have over 15 years experience in using and customizing FreeBSD systems in data processing centres, small and medium-sized businesses, and universities. We are located in Madrid, Spain. Contact us for reliable and expert partnership at contacto@adminia.es or visit our website www.adminia.es.
